name: KLA / 科磊
summary: KLA 提供检测、量测和制程控制设备，帮助先进晶圆厂提升良率；NVIDIA AI 芯片需求通过先进制程良率和扩产需求间接传导。 / KLA provides inspection, metrology, and process-control tools that help advanced fabs improve yield, giving it indirect exposure to NVIDIA AI chip manufacturing demand.
summaryZh: KLA 提供检测、量测和制程控制设备，帮助先进晶圆厂提升良率；NVIDIA AI 芯片需求通过先进制程良率和扩产需求间接传导。
summaryEn: KLA provides inspection, metrology, and process-control tools that help advanced fabs improve yield, giving it indirect exposure to NVIDIA AI chip manufacturing demand.

business.description: 公司向晶圆制造、封装、PCB 和相关电子制造客户提供检测、量测、数据分析和服务。 / The company provides inspection, metrology, data analytics, and services for wafer manufacturing, packaging, PCB, and adjacent electronics manufacturing customers.
business.descriptionZh: 公司向晶圆制造、封装、PCB 和相关电子制造客户提供检测、量测、数据分析和服务。
business.descriptionEn: The company provides inspection, metrology, data analytics, and services for wafer manufacturing, packaging, PCB, and adjacent electronics manufacturing customers.

特种半导体制程 / specialty semiconductor processes

business.thesis: NVIDIA 相关性来自先进芯片良率和缺陷控制需求，特别是高价值 AI 加速器对制程控制的要求更高。 / The NVIDIA linkage comes from yield and defect-control requirements for advanced chips, especially high-value AI accelerators.

entities.customerRoleZh: 晶圆厂客户 / 设备需求方

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: NVIDIA 需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂或封装投资间接传导，不等同于直接采购关系。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: NVIDIA 需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂或封装投资间接传导，不等同于直接采购关系。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: NVIDIA demand transmits indirectly through foundry, memory, or packaging investment and is not the same as a direct purchasing relationship.

entities.name: NVIDIA Corporation / 英伟达
entities.relationship: 不是典型直接客户；NVIDIA AI 芯片需求通过台积电、存储厂和先进封装投资间接拉动设备需求。
entities.relationshipZh: 不是典型直接客户；NVIDIA AI 芯片需求通过台积电、存储厂和先进封装投资间接拉动设备需求。
entities.relationshipEn: Not typically a direct customer; NVIDIA AI-chip demand indirectly drives equipment demand through foundries, memory makers, and advanced-packaging investment.

themeExposure.rationale: 检测量测和制程控制影响先进芯片良率，属于 AI 加速器制造链中的间接但关键设备环节。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: 检测量测和制程控制影响先进芯片良率，属于 AI 加速器制造链中的间接但关键设备环节。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: Inspection, metrology, and process control affect advanced-chip yield, making it an indirect but important equipment layer for AI accelerators.
